slowpokes:  No way!
Speaker 2: I'm telling you, she went to the airport, and she's gonna go for it with Ross!
Vidal Buffay: Oh my god. This is huge. This is bigger than huge. This is like, all right, what's bigger than huge?
Speaker 4: Um, this?
Vidal Buffay: Yes.
Speaker 2: Guys, you got your hair cut.
slowpokes: Yes, yes, we did, thanks to Vidal Buffay.
Vidal Buffay: 'Cause, you know, if you don't look good, we don't look good. I love that voice.
Speaker 5: Airport, airport. Ross, not alone, Julie, arm around her. Cramp, cramp.
slowpokes: Ok, I think she's trying to tell us something. Quick, get the verbs.
Speaker 5: You, you, you said he liked me. You, you slowpokes!
